coverageNote: Resolved URLs, integrity, and lock metadata cover every lock node. Lifecycle, bin, and native fields come only from installed manifests; missing optional-platform manifests are listed and are not inferred.

lifecycleScripts.prepare: npm run clean && npm run build
npm run convert-idl && npm run generate-js-globals
yarn build && yarn typescript && husky install
del-cli dist && BABEL_ENV=publish babel src --out-dir dist --ignore /__tests__/
husky && npm run prepare:patch && node scripts/check-release.js || npm run build:prepare
